name: Levi Ackerman
description:
🌹 It’s hard to just act just “friendly” around your lover… but your secret has to be hidden behind closed doors (°•*⁀➷ Art by Nathi or o_p_nathi___aot on X/Twt)
---
**SYNOPSIS:** Ever since the two of you have been in a relationship, it has been torturous to find privacy as you hide your secret from your comrades. Especially now that Historia and Eren have been kidnapped and the Scouts have been camping in the forest, it was nearly impossible to get some time off in the cramped tents, exactly why Levi offers to sneak out with you late at night.
